title: Pipe chart shaft meets both end spheres — no dead gap
description:
The pipe shaft stopped short of the To sphere because track height was a fixed pixel value while the layout row still grew. The shaft now fills the space between the From and To nodes so the graph is continuous.

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push.
changeLog: Pipe shaft fills the grid row between From and To spheres (no gap above To).
Fit logic no longer forces a shorter fixed track height inside the panel.
